prompt: Edit image 1: Convert the moon to a full phase, incorporating the surface details and lighting style of image 2. Add the Earth from image 3 to the background as if viewed from space, maintaining photorealism.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the half-moon image, by transforming the moon into a full phase. Integrate the surface details and overall lighting style from image 2 into the newly formed full moon. Additionally, add the Earth from image 3 into the background, positioned to appear as if viewed from space, maintaining photorealism for the entire composition.
